overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily from a wall-mounted medical station past modern furnishings toward large windows, ending at a polished wooden exit door. The scene features high-end cyberpunk aesthetic with dark paneled walls, holographic displays, and dramatic natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment corridor with medical station

events.description: natural light from living room windows becomes visible ahead as camera approaches the open space

agents.ego_description: walking along the wall past the medical station and hanging towels, heading toward the main living area

entered.detail: wall-mounted futuristic medical interface with cyan holographic displays and metallic frame
two white towels hanging on hooks against the dark paneled wall
low bench with folded towels and fabric items beneath the wall hooks
vertical dark wood or composite panels covering the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow corridor with dark paneled walls, passing a futuristic holographic medical station and white hanging towels. The space is artificially lit with ceiling fixtures, gradually revealing bright natural light from the living room ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury living room with red carpet and floor-to-ceiling windows

events.description: exits the narrow corridor into the open living room space with high ceilings
bright natural sunlight from floor-to-ceiling windows illuminates the red carpet and dark flooring

agents.ego_description: traversing the main living area toward the windows, passing the entertainment center on the left

entered.detail: large rectangular red carpet with gold trim covering the center of the living room floor
large flatscreen television mounted on the dark wall with minimalist shelving
tall windows flooding the room with natural light and offering city views
tall green potted plant near the windows adding organic contrast to the modern interior
long rectangular LED light fixtures embedded in the ceiling
low dark wooden storage cabinet against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious living room dominated by a vibrant red area rug on polished dark flooring. Large windows flood the space with natural morning light, revealing modern minimalist furniture, a wall-mounted entertainment system, and a tall potted plant near the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: far wall with storage cabinet and exit door

events.description: camera turns slightly right toward the polished wooden exit door with brass trim

agents.ego_description: approaching the far wall and turning toward the elegant wooden exit door, preparing to leave the room

entered.detail: four rectangular framed art pieces arranged in a grid above the cabinet
polished dark wooden door with reflective brass frame and modern handle
pair of tall slender red decorative vases flanking the door area

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the far wall featuring a wooden storage cabinet and framed artwork, then turns toward an elegant wooden door with brass trim. Tall red decorative vases stand near the entrance while the natural light from the windows shifts to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, clinical corridor into a bright, expansive luxury living space. It begins by gliding along dark paneled walls past a holographic medical station and white hanging towels, where artificial ceiling lights gradually give way to a glow of natural light ahead. As the camera emerges from the hallway, the scene opens into a spacious room featuring a vibrant red area rug and minimalist furniture illuminated by morning light streaming through large windows. The movement then carries forward past a wall-mounted entertainment system and a tall potted plant before turning toward a wooden storage cabinet and framed artwork. Finally, the camera approaches an elegant wooden door with brass trim, passing tall red decorative vases as the natural light shifts to the side of the frame.
